name: Tic-Tac-Toe TUI Game
description: Cross-platform terminal UI tic-tac-toe game for desktops and Harmony OS
prompt: Create a cross-platform tic-tac-toe game with a terminal user interface (TUI) that works on Linux, macOS, Windows, and Harmony OS. The game should support two-player mode with alternating turns, display the game board in the terminal, detect wins/draws, and allow players to make moves by entering coordinates. Use the bubbletea TUI framework for a polished terminal experience. Include game state management, input validation, win condition checking, and clear visual feedback.
